top.name: Spell Prism
top.rules_text: Create a Prism on target tile within 2 (8HP). When a spell passes through Prism's LOS it splits: resolve once on original target and once on nearest enemy within 2 of Prism.

channel.name: Spell Prism (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Prism has 12HP and split range is 3

bottom.name: Charged Conduit
bottom.rules_text: Imbue tile: the next spell cast from this tile gains +2 damage per charge you have (then consume all charges).

channel.name: Charged Conduit (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Only consume half charges (round up)
